seal-fragment-ring.name: Seal Fragment Ring
seal-fragment-ring.description: A ring containing a fragment of the Sovereign's prison. It anchors reality.

unraveling-gauntlets.name: Unraveling Gauntlets
unraveling-gauntlets.description: Gauntlets from the first seal. They grip reality itself.

dreamwarden-vestments.name: Dreamwarden Vestments
dreamwarden-vestments.description: Robes woven from frozen time. They exist in every moment.

frozen-moment-amulet.name: Frozen Moment Amulet
frozen-moment-amulet.description: An amulet containing a frozen moment in time. Wearing it slows perception.

dream-treads.name: Dream Treads
dream-treads.description: Boots that walk through dreams. They leave no footprints in reality.

void-anchor-plate.name: Void Anchor Plate
void-anchor-plate.description: Armor forged from the third binding. It anchors the wearer to reality absolutely.

entropy-crown.name: Entropy Crown
entropy-crown.description: A crown of crystallized entropy. It accelerates everything — including the wearer's magic.

sovereign-grasp-gloves.name: Sovereign's Grasp
sovereign-grasp-gloves.description: Gauntlets shaped from the Sovereign's own hand. They grip with cosmic force.

hand-of-endings-blade.name: Hand of Endings
hand-of-endings-blade.description: A blade carved from the Sovereign's severed finger. It cuts through anything — matter, magic, hope.

abyssal-ward-shield.name: Abyssal Ward Shield
abyssal-ward-shield.description: A shield of pure anti-void. The Abyss bounces off it.

sovereign-crown.name: Sovereign's Crown
sovereign-crown.description: A crown forged from the Void Sovereign's shattered consciousness. Wearing it is like carrying the weight of a dying universe.

reality-render-blade.name: Reality Render
reality-render-blade.description: A weapon that cuts through the fabric of reality. Each swing opens micro-tears in space.

void-heart-codex.name: Void Heart Codex
void-heart-codex.description: A codex written in void-speech. Reading it grants understanding of reality's deepest mechanics.

binding-ward-ring.name: Binding Ward Ring
binding-ward-ring.description: A ring from the Sovereign's prison. It wards against void corruption.

unraveling-treads.name: Unraveling Treads
unraveling-treads.description: Boots that walk the edge between existence and oblivion.
